raw.message: Vast worlds to explore, tons of weapons to master and unlimited ways to express yourself.

hook.summary: A mysterious narrator asks 'What is Warframe?' over dark, cinematic visuals.
hook.visual_action: A shadowy figure walks through a dark blue mist, followed by a tight close-up of an eye.

scene_flow: A mysterious figure walks through a dark blue environment asking 'What is Warframe?'
A series of fast-paced gameplay clips showcase various combat styles and abilities.
The narrator's eye is shown in close-up as he speaks about the forgotten war.
The video concludes with a branded end card and a call to action to play for free.
audience_proxy: Hardcore sci-fi action gamers who enjoy fast-paced combat and cinematic storytelling.
